description_long: This is a stylized doll head with exaggerated features, including a large, rounded cranium and a wide, open mouth displaying several teeth. The skin is a light beige color, while the hair is sculpted in a thick, textured brown mass that covers the top and sides of the head, with pronounced ridges and tufts at the back. The ears are large and protruding, set low on the sides of the head, and the eyes are small, round, and dark, giving the face a cartoonish appearance. The mouth is open in a broad, toothy grin, with a pink tongue and visible gums, adding to the playful and expressive look. The surface of the hair has a subtle texture, while the face is smoother, and the overall form is rounded and compact. There are no visible clothing details or accessories, and the object appears to be made primarily of molded plastic.
description: A stylized doll head with large ears, textured brown hair, and a wide, open-mouthed grin showing teeth and tongue. The face is cartoonish and expressive, with smooth skin and prominent features.
description_view_0: Front view shows the doll's wide open mouth, visible teeth and tongue, large ears, and small round eyes beneath a thick, textured hairline.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the protruding ear, the thickness and texture of the hair, and the rounded cheek, with the mouth and teeth partially visible.
description_view_2: Top view displays the full expanse of the textured brown hair, with tufts and ridges at the back, and no facial features visible.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the ear, hair texture, and cheek, with a partial glimpse of the mouth and teeth.
attribute_clothing_style: No visible clothing; the object consists solely of a stylized head with no garments or fabric details.
attribute_pose: The doll's head is upright and static, with no visible body, arms, or legs. The mouth is open, and the facial features are forward-facing.
attribute_facial_expression: The doll has a wide, open-mouthed grin with visible teeth and tongue, small round eyes, and a generally cheerful, playful expression.
attribute_hair_style: Short, thick, textured brown hair with pronounced ridges and tufts, styled in a cartoonish, exaggerated manner.
